'''Kerf''' was a [[Major/Legends|major]] in the [[Imperial Remnant]] and part of [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] control on [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]]. He informed [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vilim Disra]] of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon's]] arrival on one occasion.

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
